title: Hidden Redstone Lamps
description: Adds hidden redstone lamps that look similar to some existing blocks to Minecraft.
body:
**This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).**

There are a total of 68 hidden redstone lamps that are added with this mod. Each lamp works just like a vanilla redstone lamp; they just look similar to other blocks.

My video on this mod: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bKIL6lGVMhk](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bKIL6lGVMhk)

### How to craft a hidden redstone lamp:
Oak Redstone Lamp:

![Crafting an Oak Redstone Lamp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5e6b654fbd4c6dbf0e8b44b5a88bb99c68603a2.png)

_Other lamps can be crafted by replacing the oak planks with the desired block._

### All hidden redstone lamps:
- Oak Wood Redstone Lamp
- Stripped Oak Wood Redstone Lamp
- Oak Redstone Lamp
- Spruce Wood Redstone Lamp
- Stripped Spruce Wood Redstone Lamp
- Spruce Redstone Lamp
